name: Lightbolt Capacitor
desc: Stores volatile lightbolt charge for FSD drone craft, letting small hulls release short, violent bursts of crystal-guided fire.
short: Provides lightbolt burst capacity for FSD drone craft.

name: Cataclysmic Sympathy Field
desc: The Coexistence-class sustainment field converts nearby hull loss into repair mass and reinforcing structure, feeding the battleship from the violence around it.
short: Continuously extracts damaged structure from nearby ships for self-repair.

name: Reflecting-Light Crystal Intranet
desc: Establishes a crystal intranet centered on this ship. Fighters, smaller warships, and a limited number of larger hulls join the network by proximity. Networked units repair hull, gain energy/ballistic weapon range, and improve flux dissipation; designated relay units can extend coverage, but relayed units cannot relay again.

name: Reflecting-Light Crystal
desc: The public face of FSD crystal science: a living prism, energy core, and spatial computer in one sealed device. Even FSD admits its full behavior is not understood.
short: A living prism, energy core, and spatial computer sealed inside a constantly reshaping crystal body.

name: Secondary Crystal Overgrowth
desc: Reflecting-Light Crystal infestation on a non-FSD hull. Grants limited karma-system functions; infestation progress determines karma efficiency (0%-50%).
short: Crystal-infested ships gain a secondary karma system.

name: Crystal Constraint Unbinding
desc: Unbinds the Reflecting-Light Crystal core matrix, allowing controlled secondary overgrowth on non-FSD hulls. The process trades safety limits for higher output and makes the ship a source crystal for fleetwide infusion.
short: Unbinds the Reflecting-Light Crystal, trading safety limits for higher output.
sModDesc: Stabilized unbinding reduces monthly maintenance and recovery supply costs by 5%.

name: Biomass Refining Machine
desc: Farsight Drive missiles rely on this refinery to recover ammunition during combat.
short: Enables FSD missile recovery and enhancement.

name: Reflecting-Light Crystal Detritus
desc: Low-activity crystal fragments shed from mature cores. FSD fighter systems use them as compact power and control media without forming a full pilot link.
short: Crystal fragments used by FSD fighters as compact power media.

name: Miniature Reflecting-Light Crystal
desc: A stabilized miniature crystal carried by advanced FSD fighter craft, improving timeflow, recovery, and component repair during combat.
short: Improves FSD fighter timeflow and combat recovery.

name: Phasewave Stabilization Anchor
desc: A phasewave anchor that stabilizes the Concordance's drive bubble, drawing on shallow phase-space interaction without collapsing its logistics role.
short: Stabilizes phasewave drive behavior on logistics hulls.

name: Deep-Phase Interface
desc: Exports destructive dataflow from deep phase space for the Autumn Thought, turning displacement into a weaponized causality wound.
short: Weaponizes deep-phase displacement dataflow.

name: Phasewave Drive System
desc: A Reminiscence drive and assault-support package that combines phasewave acceleration, carrier pressure, and brutal ground-raid throughput.
short: Adds Reminiscence phasewave assault and raid support systems.
sModDesc: Tuned phasewave governors add +10 zero-flux speed and increase speed-fed weapon cycling by 25%.

name: Chanting Entropy Matrix
desc: An adapted matrix from an unidentified high-output warship. It expands the entropy field and converts accumulated loop stress into punishing burst effects.
short: Expands entropy-field behavior and converts loop stress into burst effects.
sModDesc: Overclocked chanting improves entropy-field range and karma efficiency, raises loop capacity to 12 and shortens loop cadence to 4 seconds; base weapon output and dissipation penalties deepen to 20%, and Singularity Bombs cost 40% karma.

name: Compact Forge Design
desc: Forge machinery consumes internal volume: missile weapon damage is reduced by 40%% (not applied to Short Spear LRM, Proliferation MIRV, Antimatter SRM, or Resonator MRM), but missile reload time is reduced by 60%%.
short: Missile damage falls, but reload time improves dramatically.
sModDesc: Built-in forge governors reduce the missile damage penalty to 30% and improve missile ammo regeneration by another 10%.

name: Harmonic Flux Wheel
desc: One of the Coaxial-class core systems, allegedly based on Eridani flux-control technology. Large weapons gain 200 range and perfect accuracy; soft-flux processing and karma cycling improve combat performance.
short: Uses a soft-flux buffer and karma cycling to improve large-weapon performance.
sModDesc: Phase-locked return channels increase large weapon range to 250 and delay 65% of energy soft flux; buffered flux returns faster, costs 50% more karma, and venting thrust is reduced.

name: Delight Module Controller
desc: Coordinates the Delight's side modules, keeping the command destroyer's shield pods and overload sprint behavior synchronized.
short: Coordinates the Delight command destroyer's side modules.

name: Clearstream Armament
desc: Clearstream armament interlock that lets the cruiser route its built-in Longinus assembly through one authorized weapon pattern at a time.

name: Clearstream Main Cannon
desc: Routes the Clearstream's Longinus assembly into its Piccolo kinetic-cannon pattern.
short: Longinus assembly set to kinetic-cannon mode.

name: Clearstream Main Cannon - Missile
desc: Routes the Clearstream's Longinus assembly into its Guzheng resonator-missile pattern.
short: Longinus assembly set to resonator-missile mode.

name: Clearstream Main Cannon - Beam
desc: Routes the Clearstream's Longinus assembly into its Vibraphone quantum-lance pattern.
short: Longinus assembly set to quantum-lance mode.

name: "Sacrifice" Hull Restructure
desc: Sacrifices most armor to induce extreme hull growth. At sufficient karma, crystal recovery and component durability improve dramatically, though repairing disabled engines and weapons consumes karma.
short: Rewrites the base body with a special derivative, trading armor for extreme hull growth.
sModDesc: Reinforced growth channels reduce the armor and minimum armor penalties by 10%, and reduce combat crew losses by 25%.

name: "Abyssal Sea" Dimensional Anchor
desc: A dimensional anchor that reduces hostile projectiles and converts the intrusion into temporary plating. Best used by ships that vent under fire or phase ships that repeatedly dive into danger.
short: Turns incoming projectile pressure into temporary plating.
sModDesc: Stabilized anchor geometry increases flux capacity by 5%, raises plating cap to 85% of flux capacity, and converts projectiles every 8 seconds; each conversion costs 7% karma.

name: "Bloodline" Ordnance Stress Program
desc: An ordnance stress program that uses Bloodline derivative reactions to push weapon effects past ordinary safety limits.
short: Overstresses weapons through controlled derivative reactions.
sModDesc: Bloodline channels bite harder: flux dissipation improves by 10%, upper-tier RoF/dissipation/damage bonuses increase, but karma drain rises to 2% per second and incoming damage rises to 20%.

name: Integrated Drone Forge
desc: Integrates compact forge furnaces into the hull, improving FSD drone and fighter support at the cost of internal volume.
short: Improves onboard FSD drone and fighter support.
sModDesc: Integrated forge routing reduces fighter replacement time by an additional 10%.

name: "Consciousness" Overrun Targeting Protocol
desc: A consciousness-linked targeting protocol that marks vulnerable enemy positions and drives local weapon systems to exploit them.
short: Improves target exploitation through consciousness-linked fire control.
sModDesc: Overrun relays increase weapon turn rate by 15% and raise karma range gain to 2.5 per 1% karma, but peak combat time is reduced by 10%.

name: Oracle Trinity Ascension
desc: An Oracle-class ascension module tying multiple FSD subsystems into one extreme upgrade path. Powerful, invasive, and not intended for casual captains.
short: Links major FSD subsystems into a high-risk ascension package.
sModDesc: Oracle integration reduces deployment and maintenance penalties to +35% and improves ship-system charge regeneration by 10%.

name: Restore Stock Fighter Wings
desc: Restores a ship to its stock fighter wing arrangement, removing FSD forge substitutions.
short: Restores stock fighter wings.

name: Crystal Forge Conversion
desc: Converts fighter support to FSD crystal-forge patterns, allowing the hull to deploy FSD-pattern craft.
short: Converts fighter support to FSD crystal-forge wings.
sModDesc: Built-in forge interfaces reduce fighter replacement time by 5%.

name: #Sphere Visual Effect (Internal)
desc: Adds a dynamic sphere visual effect to specific ships.

name: Clearstream Hull Core
desc: Core Clearstream system that manages the Spear of Longinus karma reload mechanic.
